comment.body: @N8 - it burns up BP, but you can buy an ITM SPX/XSP spread and collect theta that way.  Once you've made enough profit buy the spread on the opposite side to use less BP (i.e. if you got a  685/687C early yesterday for 1.x, you could but a 687/685P when it was down to .2 or so)
